---
name: Spec Proposal
about: Propose a change to the AIMED specification
title: '[SPEC] '
labels: 'spec, proposal'
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Brief description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposal

Detailed description of the change. Include examples of the proposed syntax or behavior.

## Backward Compatibility

Does this change break existing AIMED declarations? If so, how should migration work?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?
